---
title: "Lisa DeBruine"
output:
  html_document: default
---
I'm going to start blogging random things about R and Open Science.

* [rep()](r/rep.html)
* [scale()](r/scale.html)
* [coding schemes](r/coding.html)
* [pca](r/pca.html)
* [recode()](r/recode.html)
* [cumulative p](r/cumulative_p.html)
